Стандарт: SCTE-104
Передача в SDI: SMPTE 2010

DID: 0x41
SDID: 0x07

Примеры сообщений
41 07 28 08 ff ff 00 27 00 00 33 00 00 00 00 02 01 01 00 0e 01 04 00 00 6e 00 00 1f 40 00 96 00 00 01 01 0a 00 05 01 00 00 00 01 5d
41 07 28 08 ff ff 00 27 00 00 34 00 00 00 00 02 01 01 00 0e 01 04 00 00 6e 00 00 17 98 00 96 00 00 01 01 0a 00 05 01 00 00 00 01 ae
41 07 28 08 ff ff 00 27 00 00 35 00 00 00 00 02 01 01 00 0e 01 04 00 00 6e 00 00 0f f0 00 96 00 00 01 01 0a 00 05 01 00 00 00 01 ff
41 07 28 08 ff ff 00 27 00 00 36 00 00 00 00 02 01 01 00 0e 03 04 00 00 6f 00 00 1f 40 00 00 00 00 00 01 0a 00 05 01 00 00 00 01 cc
41 07 28 08 ff ff 00 27 00 00 37 00 00 00 00 02 01 01 00 0e 03 04 00 00 6f 00 00 17 98 00 00 00 00 00 01 0a 00 05 01 00 00 00 01 1d
41 07 28 08 ff ff 00 27 00 00 38 00 00 00 00 02 01 01 00 0e 03 04 00 00 6f 00 00 0f f0 00 00 00 00 00 01 0a 00 05 01 00 00 00 01 6e
